hero.subtitle: From your first dataset to deploying explainable predictions — learn the entire platform across five hands-on modules, with real SAQL and copy-paste examples.

cta.title: Ready to become a CRM Analytics pro?
cta.subtitle: Begin the curriculum today — it is free, open, and built to take you all the way to certified.

home.curriculumSubtitle: Start at the top and work down — together they cover the whole pipeline, from raw data to a deployed prediction.

foundations.title: Foundations
foundations.desc: What CRM Analytics is, how data becomes a secure dataset, and the building blocks of the platform.

analytics.title: Analytics & SAQL
analytics.desc: Write SAQL queries, build interactive dashboards, and add predictions with Einstein Discovery.

home.newHereDesc: Begin with Foundations and follow the modules in order for a complete, guided learning path.
home.howTitle: Learn it, try it, build it

read.title: Read the lesson
read.desc: Short, focused lessons explain one idea at a time with real examples.

try.title: Try it live
try.desc: Every concept maps to a concrete action — follow along in a free Developer org.

build.title: Build a project
build.desc: Lessons accumulate into a working pipeline: data, datasets, dashboards, a model.

ai.title: Ask the AI
ai.desc: Every page is available as Markdown and over MCP, so an assistant can tutor you.

home.resourcesTitle: The best links, curated for you
home.resourcesDesc: Beyond the curriculum, we maintain a filterable library of official docs, Trailhead, SAQL references, communities, and tools.
home.outcomesTitle: What you will be able to do
home.outcomesSubtitle: By the end you can deliver an end-to-end CRM Analytics solution — and prove it.

outcomes.d: Connect Salesforce and external sources, schedule reliable syncs, and keep datasets fresh.
Join, aggregate, and clean raw data into trustworthy, well-modeled datasets.
Author queries by hand for advanced metrics, windowing, and dashboard interactivity.
Design responsive, faceted dashboards with drill-downs and embedded Salesforce actions.
Train explainable Einstein Discovery models and surface predictions on records and in flows.
Cover the skills measured by the CRM Analytics & Einstein Discovery Consultant exam.

home.whoTitle: Built for every role on the team

personas.d: Go from drag-and-drop reports to building datasets, SAQL, and dashboards that scale.
Set up the platform, manage security predicates, and roll analytics out safely.
Design end-to-end solutions and prep for the certification with confidence.
Start from CRM basics — no prior analytics experience required.

faqs.a: Yes — every lesson is free and open source, with no sign-up required.

faqs.q: Do I need a Salesforce org?
faqs.a: A free Developer Edition org is enough to follow along with every lesson.
No. We start from CRM basics and introduce SAQL gradually, step by step.

faqs.q: Will this help me get certified?
faqs.a: The curriculum maps to the CRM Analytics & Einstein Discovery Consultant exam topics.

features.d: Connect Salesforce, Snowflake, and files; sync on a schedule; and shape everything into clean datasets with visual recipes.
Write SAQL or click to build lenses, then assemble fast, interactive dashboards with bindings, faceting, and drill-downs.
Train explainable Einstein Discovery models and surface predictions and recommendations right where your team works.

home.projectsSubtitle: Real dashboards you can recreate as you learn — then share your own with the community.

projects.d: Track stages, win rate, and forecast in one interactive view.
Score accounts with Einstein Discovery and act before they leave.
Case volume, CSAT, and resolution time for support teams.
Break revenue down geographically with drill-downs.
Rank performance with windowed SAQL and faceting.
Attribute pipeline to campaigns and measure return.

home.submitDesc: Share the dashboard you built and inspire other learners.

seo.homeTitle: CRM Analytics Academy — Learn Salesforce CRM Analytics
seo.homeDesc: A free, open-source curriculum for mastering Salesforce CRM Analytics — from data prep and SAQL to dashboards and Einstein Discovery, in five hands-on modules.
seo.aboutDesc: The story behind CRM Analytics Academy — an open-source curriculum for Salesforce CRM Analytics — and the person who builds it.
seo.resourcesDesc: A curated list of the best Salesforce CRM Analytics resources — official docs, Trailhead, SAQL references, community, and tools.
